description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named libBLS Nightly Tests that runs on a schedule and allows manual dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: main_job and linux_build_with_emscripten. main_job runs on ubuntu-18.04, sets up Python 3.6, installs required packages, builds dependencies, configures, builds, and runs tests with valgrind. linux_build_with_emscripten also runs on ubuntu-18.04, installs packages, sets up Node.js, builds dependencies with Emscripten, and runs tests.
